input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.1.2
            TITLE: the shutdown circuit must directly carry the current driving the accumulator isolation relays

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.1.2: The Shutdown Circuit must directly carry the current driving the Accumulator Isolation Relays
EV.7.1.2 The Shutdown Circuit must directly carry the current driving the Accumulator Isolation Relays 
(AIRs) and the Precharge Circuit Relay.

final_answer: The Shutdown Circuit must directly carry the current driving the Accumulator Isolation Relays (AIRs) and the Precharge Circuit Relay.
